reasoning:
The baseline Elo score for Wei Yi on 2025-10-26 is virtually guaranteed to be 2754 (the October 1, 2025 rating). Increasing this by 1% requires a jump of 27.54 points to 2782. Gaining >27 rating points at the ~2750 elite level in a single month or two is extremely rare, as it implies gaining +5 to +7 score over expected performance against fellow grandmasters (equivalent to a tremendous winning streak with zero losses). There are no news reports indicating Wei Yi played and scored massively in October 2025.
Because the FIDE rating releases happen on the first of each month, the November 2 and November 25 resolution dates will almost certainly reflect the November 1 list, which lacks any such astronomical score increase based on current news. By January 2026, he will have played more tournaments, providing a slightly higher (though still very small) chance of crossing 2782. Accordingly, the probability is set near the minimum limit of 2% for the imminent November dates and slightly higher for January, bringing the prediction closer to 0.5 over a longer time horizon as per guidelines.
